name: Warm Lamb Salad with Mixed Greens
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces lamb leg meat, trimmed and sliced into 1 1/4 in x 1/3 in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the dressing ingredients and blend until smooth. You can prepare the dressing up to 1 day in advance. Cover and refrigerate.
2. Heat 1/4 cup of the dressing in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the lamb and cook, stirring frequently, for about 3 minutes for medium-rare. Remove from heat and let it cool slightly.
3. Transfer the cooked lamb to a bowl. Season with salt and pepper.
4. In the same skillet, sauté the artichoke hearts, bell pepper, and mushrooms until tender. Add the mixed greens, mint, and basil leaves. Toss gently to combine.
5. Pour enough dressing over the salad mixture to season to taste. Gently toss everything together.
6. Mound the salads on plates and top with lamb. Garnish with fresh basil and mint sprigs.
Title: Warm Lamb Salad with Mixed Greens
